description: SSOT config for ALL GraphBrew ECG cache experiments. Add an experiment HERE (a named entry under "experiments"); never add a new top-level script. Run with: experiments.py run <name>.

headline-scale.description: AXIS 1 (replacement, vs GRASP & P-OPT): the headline -- 8B full epoch + uniform structure prefetcher (all policies) + iso-area charged P-OPT, swept across pressure. Metric: demand miss rate. ECG >= GRASP and >= P-OPT at zero reserved ways. cache_sim.

prefetch-off-control.description: AXIS 1 control (replacement, prefetch OFF): degree-0 control (no structure prefetcher) -- separates a real replacement win from structure-stream hiding.

multi-kernel.description: Does the ECG win generalize beyond PageRank? GAP-5 kernels at high pressure -- closes the one-kernel HPCA gap.

prefetch-axis.description: AXIS 2 (prefetch, vs DROPLET): eviction FIXED=LRU, graph prefetch in {none,DROPLET,ECG_PFX}, uniform stream OFF. Metric: demand-to-mem + total bandwidth. Isolates ECG's epoch-filtered prefetch vs DROPLET. Honest Pareto: DROPLET is latency-optimal (cuts demand most), ECG_PFX is efficiency-optimal (3x fewer fills, all useful) reusing the SAME epoch as replacement.

combined-axis.description: AXIS 3 (combined): eviction x prefetch full stacks. Baselines {GRASP|P-OPT replacement + DROPLET prefetch} vs the unified {ECG-evict + ECG_PFX} where ONE per-edge epoch drives both. Metric: demand-to-mem + total bandwidth. Shows the unified signal beats the union of separate mechanisms.

anchor-cache.description: Cross-sim equivalence anchor on cache_sim (literature 1MB canonical L3, prefetch OFF).

anchor-gem5.description: Cross-sim equivalence anchor on gem5 (cycle-accurate, 1MB, prefetch OFF).

anchor-sniper.description: Cross-sim equivalence anchor on Sniper (interval, 1MB, prefetch OFF). Uses the REAL graph kernel (sg_kernel) -- NOT the pr_kernel_smoke default which ignores the graph and emits l3_mr~1.0 garbage. Memory-capped (SDE runaway guard).

xsim-cache.description: Phase C cross-sim direction-agreement on cache_sim. PRESSURED cell kron_s16_k4@128kB (property 256KB > L2 64kB > nothing -> spills to L3) where all 3 sims AGREE GRASP/ECG help (email-Eu-core@1MB has no pressure -> uninformative). Robust policy set all 3 sims model identically; prefetch OFF, -o5 (DBG reorder = GRASP-fair).

xsim-gem5.description: Phase C cross-sim direction-agreement on gem5 (cycle-accurate). Same pressured kron_s16_k4@128kB cell + policy set as xsim-cache. Absolute miss rates differ from cache_sim (full-ISA vs graph-only access population) -> the claim is DIRECTION/ranking agreement, not absolute equality.

xsim-sniper.description: Phase C cross-sim direction-agreement on Sniper (interval, REAL sg_kernel). Same pressured kron_s16_k4@128kB cell + policy set. Memory-capped (SDE runaway guard).
